Metadata.homeTitle: Ericeira Fishing — Local boat & shore fishing
Metadata.homeDescription: Full-day boat trips and half-day shore fishing with local skippers. Small groups, tackle and licences included.
Metadata.joinUsDescription: Trip times, what’s included, and join the waiting list for the next spot. WhatsApp or form.
Metadata.contactTitle: Join the waiting list — Ericeira Fishing
Metadata.contactDescription: Tell us you’d like the next available spot on a trip with Ericeira Fishing.

Home.lead: Full-day boat fishing and relaxed half-day shore sessions with local skippers—small groups, all gear and licences included.

about.p1: Ericeira Fishing was born from a deep connection to the sea and the fishing traditions of Ericeira.
about.p2: We offer a hands-on local outing on one of Portugal’s most iconic coastlines. Hear the fishermen’s stories, learn their techniques, and let yourself be guided by people who know these waters inside out. Whether you’re a beginner or an experienced angler, our trips are relaxed, safe, and memorable.
about.p3: This is not mass tourism. You’re out with crews who grew up on this harbour—families who’ve worked the same boats and marks for decades. We keep groups small, use quality equipment, and aim for a friendly atmosphere where everyone feels welcome on board.
about.p4: More than just fishing — it’s an experience: the ocean, the coastline, the thrill of the catch, and the unique spirit of Ericeira.

boat.title: Meet the fishermen — boat fishing
boat.body1: Every trip is a full day on the water, kept simple and worry-free. You get a guided look around the port, time with local fishermen, and fishing with an experienced skipper and crew.
boat.body2: All tackle and required licences are included. Groups stay small for comfort, safety, and a more personal day at sea.
boat.body3: Safety gear is provided so you can relax and fish the Ericeira coast from morning to late afternoon.

shore.title: Shore fishing
shore.body: Our shore fishing experience is a relaxed half-day for everyone, including children and beginners. With an experienced local fisherman you’ll fish from Ericeira’s beautiful coastline while learning simple techniques and tips for local species. All equipment and required licences are included. Small groups and a friendly atmosphere make it a great way to discover fishing, breathe the sea air, and spend quality time by the ocean.

gallery.altPreviousTrips: Guests fishing on a previous boat trip along the Ericeira coast
gallery.altOurFish: Fresh catch from an Ericeira Fishing trip
gallery.altBoatAndCrew: Skipper João Juma on the boat with fishing gear

albano.name: Mestre Albano
albano.bio: With over 50 years of experience, Captain Albano calls Ericeira’s coast home.
albano.portraitAlt: Portrait of Mestre Albano, boat captain

joao.name: João Juma
joao.bio: Ericeira-born, João runs each trip end to end—from the first message to the last cast—so guests fish with people who live this coast every day.

cta.title: Join the waiting list
cta.body: Small-group trips fill up quickly. Add your name and we’ll let you know as soon as the next dates open.

JoinUs.title: Join the crew
JoinUs.schedule: Our trips usually start around 8:30 and finish around 4 PM.
JoinUs.waitingList: Tell us boat or shore and when you’re free. We’ll reply with what fits and add you to the list for the next opening.
JoinUs.reachUs: You can reach us on WhatsApp or join our community online.
JoinUs.community: Follow us and stay close to the community for news and trip updates.
JoinUs.formIntro: Alternatively, you can join the waiting list through the form below.

Contact.title: Join the waiting list
Contact.description: Leave your details and message. We’ll get back to you with the next available spots.
Contact.name: Name
Contact.success: Thank you. You’re on our list — we’ll be in touch about the next available spot.
